title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Rahu Catalysts - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Rahu Catalysts in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!
